---
title: "Course Recommendation Web App"
subtitle: "Hackathon · 2024"
---

## Overview

A full-stack web application that recommends courses based on user needs, built and tested under hackathon constraints.

**Stack:** JavaScript · Frontend · Backend

## What I built

- Engineered features end-to-end, including testing functionality and resolving defects
- Designed and implemented user-facing features in JavaScript to improve usability and interaction

## Skills demonstrated

Full-stack development · JavaScript · Testing · Debugging · UX focus
